item.title: [Segurança] CVE-2020-37239 - Check Point
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2020-37239 - Check Point
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 9.8
Resumo:
libbabl 0.1.62 contains a broken double free detection vulnerability that allows attackers to bypass memory safety checks by exploiting signature overwriting in freed chunks. Attackers can call babl_free() twice on the same pointer without triggering detection, as libc's malloc metadata overwrites babl's signature field upon freeing, enabling potential memory corruption and code execution.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2020-37239

item.title: [Segurança] NGINX CVE-2026-42945 Exploited in the Wild, Causing Worker Crashes and Possible RCE
item.description:
🚨 NGINX CVE-2026-42945 Exploited in the Wild, Causing Worker Crashes and Possible RCE
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 9.2
Resumo:
A newly disclosed security flaw impacting NGINX Plus and NGINX Open has come under active exploitation in the wild, days after its public disclosure, according to VulnCheck. The vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2026-42945 (CVSS score: 9.2), is a heap buffer overflow in ngx_http_rewrite_module affecting NGINX versions 0.6.27 through 1.30.0. According to AI-native security company depthfirst, the
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/05/nginx-cve-2026-42945-exploited-in-wild.html

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2021-47959 - WordPress
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2021-47959 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.5
Resumo:
WordPress Plugin WPGraphQL 1.3.5 contains a denial of service vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to exhaust server resources by sending batched GraphQL queries with duplicated fields. Attackers can send POST requests to the GraphQL endpoint with amplified field duplication payloads to trigger server out-of-memory conditions and MySQL connection errors.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2021-47959

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-46359 - Azure
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-46359 - Azure
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Azure
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.5
Resumo:
phpMyFAQ before 4.1.2 contains a sql injection vulnerability in CurrentUser::setTokenData that allows authenticated attackers to execute arbitrary SQL by injecting malicious OAuth token claims. Attackers with Azure AD accounts containing SQL metacharacters in display names or JWT claims can break out of string literals and execute arbitrary database queries.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-46359

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-42897 explora XSS no Outlook Web Access para execução de JavaScript arbitrário - Cyber Security Brazil
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-42897 explora XSS no Outlook Web Access para execução de JavaScript arbitrário - Cyber Security Brazil
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2020-37233 - WordPress
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2020-37233 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 6.4
Resumo:
WordPress Plugin Buddypress 6.2.0 contains a persistent cross-site scripting vulnerability that allows authenticated attackers with moderator privileges to inject malicious script code through the figure parameter in wp:html blocks. Attackers can inject iframe elements with event handlers like onload that execute when administrators or privileged users preview or view the affected page content, enabling session hijac...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2020-37233

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-8681 - WordPress
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-8681 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 5.3
Resumo:
The Essential Chat Support plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to authorization bypass in all versions up to, and including, 1.0.1. This is due to the plugin not properly verifying that a user is authorized to perform an action. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to reset all plugin configuration settings — including general settings, display rules, custom CSS, and WooCommerce tab settings — to their...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-8681

item.title: [Segurança] Funnel Builder Flaw Under Active Exploitation Enables WooCommerce Checkout Skimming
item.description:
💣 Funnel Builder Flaw Under Active Exploitation Enables WooCommerce Checkout Skimming
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A critical security vulnerability impacting the Funnel Builder plugin for WordPress has come under active exploitation in the wild to inject malicious JavaScript code into WooCommerce checkout pages with the goal of stealing payment data. Details of the activity were published by Sansec this week. The vulnerability currently does not have an official CVE identifier.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/05/funnel-builder-flaw-under-active.html

item.title: [Infraestrutura] VCF Networking 9.1: Seamless DDI Integration with Infoblox
item.description:
📰 VCF Networking 9.1: Seamless DDI Integration with Infoblox
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
Related VCF Networking 9.1 Posts: Network Services Simpler VPC Connectivity Control Integration with Infoblox VMware Cloud Foundation (VCF) provides a robust suite of self-service networking capabilities (as covered in our VCF Networking 9.1 post Network Services), including native IP Address Management (IPAM). However, the reality for many enterprise environments is that they already rely on …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/05/15/vcf-networking-9-1-seamless-ddi-integration-with-infoblox/

item.title: [Segurança] Microsoft rejects critical Azure vulnerability report, no CVE issued
item.description:
📰 Microsoft rejects critical Azure vulnerability report, no CVE issued
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A security researcher claims Microsoft quietly fixed an Azure Backup for AKS vulnerability after rejecting his report, and without issuing a CVE. Microsoft disputes the claim, telling BleepingComputer the behavior was expected and that "no product changes were made," despite the researcher documenting a silent fix.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/microsoft-rejects-critical-azure-vulnerability-report-no-cve-issued/

item.title: [Segurança] Grafana GitHub Token Breach Led to Codebase Download and Extortion Attempt
item.description:
📰 Grafana GitHub Token Breach Led to Codebase Download and Extortion Attempt
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Grafana has disclosed that an "unauthorized party" obtained a token that granted them the ability to access the company's GitHub environment and download its codebase. "Our investigation has determined that no customer data or personal information was accessed during this incident, and we have found no evidence of impact to customer systems or operations," Grafana said in a series of
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/05/grafana-github-token-breach-led-to.html

item.title: [Infraestrutura] The Open Source Advantage: Building from Source for Ultimate Security
item.description:
📰 The Open Source Advantage: Building from Source for Ultimate Security
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: VMware
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The convenience of modern software distribution—relying on upstream projects to provide pre-built, easy-to-install packages—is undeniable. It is hard to dispute using public repositories of pre-built software like Docker Hub is great for getting up and running quickly. However, recent security incidents, such as the unauthorized access to the build infrastructure of the popular security scanner …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/tanzu/the-open-source-advantage-building-from-source-for-ultimate-security/
